Notice Of Kaiser Defendants' Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kennedy P Richardson, Esq. of MARION'S INN 510/451-6770, for defendants KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC., THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC. AND KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, moving to compel arbitration and stay action
Luis V. Garcia, Esq. of RANKIN, SPROAT 510/465-3922, for defendants S. F. Hearing and Speech Center and Garlene Cheung, opposing the motion
Christopher B. Dolan, Esq. and Curtis A. Rau, Esq. of THE DOLAN LAW FIRM 421-2800, for plaintiff and opposing party Yukiko Berg

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court denied DEFENDANTS KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC., THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC. AND KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS' Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action. Prevailing party is to prepare an order.(JLW/301/DR) Reporter: Beldon Yee CSR #2647
